results.rendered_html:
abhraṃkaṣa a. [abhraṃ kaṣati pīḍayati tuṃgatvāt; khac mumāgamaśca  P. III. 2. 42 ] Touching or scraping the clouds, very high; ādāyābhraṃkaṣaṃ prāyānmalayaṃ phalaśalinaṃ  Bk. ;  K. 33 ;  Dk. 110 ;  Mv. 6. 7. 
— ṣaḥ
1 Wind, air; abhraṃkaṣo vāyuḥ  Sk. 
2 A mountain.
